# AASIST vendor source (optional)

Place a **verified** upstream AASIST implementation here, e.g.:

```text
code/phase7/aasist/vendor/AASIST/
```

Alternatively use `external/AASIST/` at repo root and pass `--aasist_src external/AASIST` to integration scripts.

**Do not** commit unverified copies. Phase 7E1 does not download weights or datasets automatically.
